name: @emoya-cmyk/dashboard-core
description: Canonical dashboard-family core. Auth/authz + security layer (JWT verify, multi-tenant scope guards, security headers, dependency-free rate limiter / AI budget, password floor + login timing equalizer + JWT boot guard) as dependency-injected factories, plus the engine layer (increment 1: `baselines` — the self-calibrating statistics core: median/MAD, robust z, linreg slope, EWMA, severity buckets, `summarizeSeries`).
